goal: Refactor data pipeline into three sequential stages with proper interfaces
context: Python data processing module with parse/transform/format stages currently in one file. Extract each stage into its own module, building on the previous stage's interface.

tasks.title: Extract parser stage
tasks.goal: Move parse function into src/parser.py with a typed interface. Update data.py to import from it.

tasks.title: Extract transform stage
tasks.goal: Move transform function into src/transform.py, consuming ParseResult from parser module.

tasks.title: Extract formatter stage
tasks.goal: Move format_output function into src/formatter.py, consuming TransformResult from transform module.
